name: Lentil Soup with Franankfurters
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop the leek or green onion.
2. Wash the lentils thoroughly.
3. In a 2½-quart saucepan, bring 6 cups of water to a boil.
4. Add the lentils, bacon, chopped leek or green onion, carrot, and celery to the boiling water. Simmer, partially covered, for 30 to 40 minutes.
5. In a frying pan, sauté the chopped onion in vegetable oil until soft.
6. Sprinkle flour over the onions and stir. Lower the heat, stirring constantly, and cook until the flour turns light brown. Do not burn the flour.
7. Stir in half a cup of hot lentil soup into the browned flour mixture; beat well with a wire whisk.
8. Add vinegar to the frying pan contents.
9. Pour the contents of the frying pan into the lentil pot and stir together.
10. Cover and simmer for 30 minutes or until the lentils are soft.
11. Add the frankfurters and catsup. Cook until the frankfurters are heated through.
12. Season with salt and pepper, then serve hot.
